---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a defensive enhancement for an existing project
title: "[FEAT] Project NN - Short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Project

Which project does this enhancement target? (e.g., "22 - Phishing URL Detector")

## Defensive purpose

What attack or threat does this feature help defend against?
Include relevant MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs if known (e.g., T1566.002).

## Describe the feature

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional context

References, papers, or MITRE resources that support this request.
